structure.description: Heavy, distorted sub-bass drone with a shimmering platinum-grade synth pad.
Lazy, sludge-like beat. Heavy kick, snapping snare with long decay. Bassline is a sliding, high-viscosity, filtered sine wave.
Maximum saturation. Adding distorted brass stabs and a high-frequency 'platinum' whistle. The beat becomes a thickening slurry of percussion.
Sudden drop to a single, high-frequency sine wave that abruptly cuts to a 401-error-style silence.
